reviews.review_title: Where is community build for mixed ?
reviews.review_description:
Every room has everything but the mixed realit
y room. No community builds and no track parts available. I bought it for mixed reality too. Jesus loves you !

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. I'm glad that you like it. Remember to check back the game every now and then as there will be more awesome updates incoming!
Thank you for your review. I'm glad that you like it. Remember to check back the game every now and then as there will be more awesome updates incoming!

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and one of the best free games I recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! As the developer of this game, I might be bias, but I also think Stunt track builder is one of the best free games out there too.

reviews.review_title: Like Hot Wheels but without the mess
reviews.review_description: Amazing game, I find myself getting lost in my own ideas while I set up tracks. Game runs great in my experience as well. I hope you try this game as well and enjoy it just as much as I do

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! I'm happy that you enjoy the game. As I'm still working on the game regularly,  remember to check back into the game every once in a while for new updates and features.
Thank you for your review. I'm glad that you like it. Remember to check back the game every now and then as there will be more awesome updates incoming!

Thank you for your review. It's always make me happy to know that my players are enjoying the game. Thanks for playing (and reviewing) and remember to check back every now and then for more contents and features.

reviews.review_description: It looked cool at first but then when I accidentally turned on rollercoaster mode and my track had so much loops I didn’t know how to turn it off so I frickin took off my headset so fast and went straight to the toilet to throw up hated it so much deleted the game and never played it again

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your review and I'm sorry for your experience. If you are to give my game a second chance, to exit the Roller coaster mode, you can click on the Joystick button, or X or Y button, it will instantly exit the roller-caster mode.
Thank you for your review. I'm glad that you like it. Remember to check back the game every now and then as there will be more awesome updates incoming!

reviews.review_description:
All kinds of types of tracks and a very widespread amount of combinations. This is a very fun experience and you should try it once if you dont like it you can refund it and ten bucks is a fair amount of cash for this type of game. If you want 25% discount you can use my 

refferal link:

reviews.review_description: This game can bring back childhood memories because of the hot wheels vibe to it

reviews.review_title: I can't get the full game
reviews.review_description: It won't lete get the full game so I can't get anymore track pieces or cars and stuff and Im really unsure on how to fix it

developer_response.body: Hi, the latest update of the game remove all the IAP features, so the full game is now fully unlocked and you can get all cars and tracks now.
